name: CALO-RPD Studio
release_name: Continuable Policy and Experiment Evolution Release
scientific_claim: Software continuation/provenance release; no universal optimizer or policy superiority claim.
major_capabilities: exact resumable policy-training checkpoints with cumulative/additional/indefinite modes
policy lineages with immutable checkpoints and latest vs best-qualified roles
experiment revisions and deterministic additional paired-run extension
exact CALO optimizer-state continuation from explicit source FE horizons
paired recompute-from-original-seed higher-horizon extension for all algorithms
publication-safe all-paired/predeclared protocols and explicitly exploratory manual extension
horizon-specific evidence snapshots, validation, statistics and export
scientific problem fingerprints bound to exact CALO run checkpoints
explicit_limitations: policy training and complete runtime CALO are not one bit-identical transition implementation
bundled policy superiority is not proven
full CALO cognitive/control path is not fully device-resident
exact optimizer-state continuation is CALO-only; baselines use paired recompute-from-seed
automatic periodic policy qualification is not implemented
